name: theater-mode
description: Stash plugin that adds a button to make the video player take the full width of the page.

scripts.sync: test -n "$STASH_PLUGIN_DIR" || (echo 'Error: STASH_PLUGIN_DIR not set' && exit 1) && rm -rf "$STASH_PLUGIN_DIR" && mkdir -p "$STASH_PLUGIN_DIR" && cp theater.js TheaterMode.yml "$STASH_PLUGIN_DIR/"
